title: 10 best herbal creams for adrenal fatigue

remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Ashwagandha cream helps to adapt the body's response to stress by reducing cortisol levels and improving resistance to stress, thereby alleviating symptoms of adrenal fatigue.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the body, which is often exacerbated in cases of adrenal fatigue, leading to reduced pain and discomfort.
Anxiolytic Properties: Ashwagandha cream's anxiolytic effects help to calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress-related symptoms that can exacerbate adrenal fatigue.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its adaptogenic properties. The herb helps to regulate cortisol levels, which are often imbalanced in individuals with adrenal fatigue. Ashwagandha creams work to reduce inflammation and stress in the body, promoting a sense of calm and relaxation. By supporting adrenal function and reducing stress, ashwagandha creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, brain fog, and insomnia, promoting overall well-being and hormonal balance.
remedy_constituents: Withanolides: These steroidal lactones have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and promote the recovery of adrenal function.

Withaferin A: This alkaloid has been shown to have a protective effect on the adrenal glands by reducing stress-induced damage and promoting the production of cortisol, a hormone essential for adrenal function.

Catechins: These phenolic compounds have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the adrenal glands, promoting their recovery and function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Withania somnifera are rich in bioactive compounds, making them a primary source of ashwagandha's therapeutic properties.
Leaves: The leaves contain a high concentration of withanolides, which are responsible for the plant's adaptogenic and stress-relieving effects.
Seeds: The seeds are used to extract withanolides and other bioactive compounds, which are then incorporated into creams for their potential benefits in managing adrenal fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest withania somnifera roots and leaves according to their optimal time for minimal moisture content.
Dry the harvested withania somnifera roots and leaves in a low-temperature oven at 50 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Combine 100 grams of dried withania somnifera roots and 50 grams of dried leaves with 200 grams of base cream in a mixing bowl.
Add 10 milliliters of distilled water to the mixture and blend for 5 minutes using an electric mixer.
Transfer the mixture to a glass jar and store it in a cool dark place for at least 7 days before use.

remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Herbal maidenhair tree creams contain adaptogens like Adhatoda vasica, which helps to regulate stress response and cortisol levels, allowing the body to adapt to stress and promoting recovery from adrenal fatigue.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The creams often feature anti-inflammatory herbs like Guggul, which can help reduce inflammation in the adrenals, alleviating symptoms of fatigue, brain fog, and mood disturbances associated with adrenal fatigue.

Nourishing and rejuvenating properties: Maidenhair tree creams typically include nourishing ingredients like Glycerin, which helps to moisturize and soothe the skin, promoting a sense of calm and relaxation, while also supporting the body's natural healing processes.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its unique ability to improve blood flow and reduce oxidative stress. The cream's active compounds, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, help to increase the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to the adrenal glands. This can help to support the adrenal glands' function and promote their natural production of hormones, such as cortisol, which is often deficient in individuals with adrenal fatigue. Regular use of Ginkgo biloba cream may help to alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, including fatigue, brain fog, and insomnia.
remedy_constituents: Bilobalide: This triterpene helps to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the adrenal glands, thus alleviating the symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Quercetin: As a flavonoid, quercetin acts as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to protect the adrenal glands from damage and supports their function.

Isorhapontigenin: This lignan has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and promote the health of the adrenal glands, thereby alleviating adrenal fatigue symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Seeds: Contain bilobalide, a compound thought to aid in reducing stress and improving energy levels.
Barks: Contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which may help reduce stress and promote relaxation, aiding in adrenal fatigue recovery.
remedy_recipe: Gather 100g of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and 500ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil.
Infuse the dried ginkgo biloba leaves in the carrier oil at a ratio of 1:5 for 2-3 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth to remove the solids and discard the solids.
Combine the strained oil with 50g of beeswax and 20g of vitamin e oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 160-180 degrees fahrenheit for 10-15 minutes to create a smooth and consistent cream.

remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: St. John's Wort helps the body adapt to stress by regulating cortisol levels and promoting balance in the HPA (hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal) axis, which is often disrupted in adrenal fatigue.

Antioxidant activity: St. John's Wort's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation caused by chronic stress, which can exacerbate adrenal fatigue symptoms such as fatigue, brain fog, and insomnia.

Regulation of neurotransmitters: St. John's Wort has been shown to influence the production and regulation of neurotransmitters like serotonin, dopamine, and GABA, which play a crucial role in regulating mood, energy, and stress response, all of which are often impaired in adrenal fatigue.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hypericum perforatum, also known as St John's Wort, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its adaptogenic properties and ability to support the body's natural stress response. The herb contains hypericin and hyperforin, which may help regulate cortisol levels, reducing the strain on the adrenal glands. By promoting a balance in cortisol production, St John's Wort creams may aid in alleviating symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, brain fog, and mood disturbances, allowing the body to recover and adapt to stress more efficiently.
remedy_constituents: Hyperforin: Hyperforin has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with adrenal fatigue, promoting overall adrenal function and well-being.
Hypericin: Hypericin has a stabilizing effect on the adrenal glands, helping to regulate cortisol levels and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, anxiety, and insomnia.

N-feruloyltyramine: N-feruloyltyramine is a phenolic compound with a potential anxiolytic effect, which may help alleviate anxiety and stress associated with adrenal fatigue, promoting a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in flavonoids and hypericin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help alleviate adrenal fatigue symptoms.
Flowers: High in hyperforin, a compound that can help regulate the body's stress response and promote relaxation, addressing adrenal fatigue.
Roots: Contain bioflavonoids and phenolic compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe and calm the adrenal glands.
remedy_recipe: Gather 250 grams of dried hypericum perforatum flowers and 500 grams of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Infuse the dried flowers in the carrier oil at a ratio of 1:2 for 2-3 weeks in a cool dark place.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove the plant material.
Add 100 grams of beeswax and 50 grams of vitamin e oil to the infused oil and heat the mixture to 180-190 fahrenheit.
Pour the mixture into jars and let it cool and solidify before labeling and storing the cream.

remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Siberian Ginseng cream helps to adapt the body's response to stress, reducing the negative impact on adrenal glands and promoting a balanced hormonal state.
Antioxidant properties: The cream's antioxidant compounds help protect the adrenal glands from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, supporting their optimal function.
Vasodilatory effects: Siberian Ginseng creams can dilate blood vessels, improving blood flow to the adrenal glands and promoting the delivery of essential nutrients and oxygen for proper function.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Eleutherococcus senticosus, also known as Siberian ginseng, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because it stimulates the body's natural response to stress, promoting balance and resilience. The active compounds in Eleutherococcus senticosus, such as eleutherosides, support adrenal function and enhance the body's ability to cope with physical and emotional demands. By nourishing the adrenal glands and improving energy metabolism, these creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, including fatigue, weakness, and mood disturbances, allowing individuals to regain their vitality and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Eleutherosides: These saponin glycosides help with adrenal fatigue by stimulating the body's adaptogenic response, enhancing stress resistance, and promoting overall well-being.

Iridoids: Iridoids, such as isolexoside B and eleutheroside E, have been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties and help regulate cortisol levels, which can become imbalanced in individuals with adrenal fatigue.
Lignans: Lignans, like sesamin and sesamolin, have been found to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help reduce oxidative stress and support adrenal function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Eleutherococcus senticosus are rich in bioactive compounds that help to adapt the body to stress and improve its response to fatigue.
Leaves: The leaves of the plant contain a high concentration of eleutherosides, which are known to have a positive effect on the adrenal glands and help alleviate fatigue.
Barks: The barks of Eleutherococcus senticosus are used to create creams that help to increase energy and reduce stress by stimulating the adrenal glands and promoting a sense of well-being.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 cups of dried roots of eleutherococcus senticosus and wash them with cool water for 10 minutes.
Use a coffee grinder or spice grinder to grind the roots into a fine powder for 5 minutes.
Combine 2 tablespoons of the powder with 8 tablespoons of beeswax and 2 tablespoons of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler for 30 minutes to 1 hour, stirring occasionally, until the beeswax is fully dissolved.
Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool and thicken for 2-3 hours before pouring into containers.

remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound helps to reduce cortisol levels, which can become elevated in cases of adrenal fatigue, allowing for a reduction in stress response and promoting relaxation.
Flavonoids: These bioactive compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the adrenal glands, reducing inflammation and stress that may be contributing to fatigue.
Saponins: These natural compounds have been shown to improve adrenal function by enhancing the body's ability to respond to stress, promoting adaptability and resilience in the face of adversity.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra, also known as licorice, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its adaptogenic properties. The root extract of this plant has been traditionally used to support the adrenal glands and promote balance in the body's stress response. The cream's active compounds, such as glycyrrhizin, help to reduce cortisol levels and alleviate symptoms of adrenal exhaustion, such as fatigue, brain fog, and insomnia. Regular use of licorice root cream may also enhance overall adrenal function and improve resilience to stress.
remedy_constituents: Glycyrrhizin: This triterpenoid saponin has anti-inflammatory and corticosteroid-like properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue by reducing inflammation and supporting the body's natural cortisol production.

Liquiritin: A phenolic compound, liquiritin has been shown to have anti-stress and adaptogenic properties, which may help the body adapt to stress and promote balance in the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, a key player in adrenal fatigue.

18β-Glycyrrhetinic acid: A triterpenoid compound, 18β-Glycyrrhetinic acid has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce oxidative stress and promote the recovery of adrenal function, thereby alleviating symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: They contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce cortisol levels and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Leaves: They are known to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation associated with adrenal fatigue.
Seeds: They contain saponins, which can help regulate adrenal function and alleviate symptoms of fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots and wash them thoroughly with distilled water.
Boil 500 milliliters of distilled water with the roots in a saucepan for 10 minutes.
Strain the liquid from the roots and discard the solids then measure out 100 milliliters of the liquid.
Mix 50 grams of emulsifying wax and 50 grams of candelilla wax in a separate saucepan over low heat.
Combine the liquid from step 3 with the melted wax mixture and add 2 milliliters of vitamin e oil then whip until thickened.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Dandelion cream's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue by promoting a healthy cortisol response.

Adrenal Tonic and Regulator: Dandelion root has been traditionally used as an adrenal tonic, helping to regulate the body's adrenal function, improve circulation, and support the production of cortisol and other hormones, all of which are disrupted in adrenal fatigue.

Liver and Kidney Support: Dandelion cream also supports liver and kidney function, which is essential for detoxifying the body of hormonal imbalances and toxins that can contribute to adrenal fatigue.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its adaptogenic properties, which help the body regulate its response to stress. The cream is rich in inulin, a prebiotic that supports gut health and promotes the growth of beneficial bacteria, crucial for a healthy adrenal system. Additionally, Taraxacum officinale contains vitamins and minerals such as A, C, and potassium, which help to nourish and support adrenal function, promoting a balanced response to stress and fatigue.
remedy_constituents: Taraxasterol: This triterpene has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, contributing to adrenal fatigue relief.
Taraxeryl acetate: This triterpene ester has been shown to have a calming effect on the body, reducing stress and anxiety, which are often associated with adrenal fatigue.

Quercetin: This flavonoid has potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect the adrenal glands from oxidative damage and promote their recovery, contributing to relief from adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are rich in vitamins and minerals, particularly potassium, which helps to reduce stress and fatigue.
Roots: The roots contain inulin, a natural energy source that can help to support adrenal function and reduce fatigue.
Flowers: The flowers are a natural source of flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 30 grams of dried taraxacum officinale in 500 milliliters of carrier oil for two weeks.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into a clean container after two weeks of infusion.
Add 10 grams of beeswax to the infused oil and heat it gently until the wax dissolves.
Remove the container from heat and let it cool to a temperature of 35 to 40 degrees celsius.
Whip the mixture with a hand mixer until it becomes light and fluffy in consistency.

remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover cream contains high levels of isoflavones, which have been shown to support hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue by reducing stress and anxiety.
Phytoestrogens: Phytoestrogens in red clover cream mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to regulate hormone production and reduce cortisol levels, a key factor in adrenal fatigue.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Red clover cream contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can exacerbate symptoms of adrenal fatigue and contribute to overall health decline.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Trifolium pratense, also known as red clover, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because they contain isoflavones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help regulate the adrenal glands. The adrenal glands produce cortisol, a hormone that helps the body respond to stress. Red clover creams can help increase cortisol production, reduce inflammation, and promote overall adrenal function. This can lead to improved energy levels, reduced fatigue, and a sense of well-being. The creams can also support the body's natural stress response and promote a healthy balance of hormones.
remedy_constituents: Isoflavones (specifically genistein and formononetin): These plant-derived estrogens may help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue by supporting adrenal hormone balance and regulating cortisol production.
Phenolic acids (such as caffeic acid and ferulic acid): These antioxidants may help protect the adrenal glands from oxidative stress, reducing inflammation and promoting overall adrenal health.

Saponins (specifically 28-O-acetyl-6-hydroxy-3,7-dimethoxyflavone): These bioactive compounds may help support the body's natural stress response by modulating cortisol levels and promoting relaxation.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used in creams due to their high content of isoflavones, which may help to alleviate adrenal fatigue symptoms by supporting hormone balance.
Flowers: Used in creams due to their rich isoflavone content, including formononetin and biochanin A, which may help to reduce stress and promote adrenal function.
Seeds: Used in creams due to their high content of isoflavones and other phytoestrogens, which may help to support adrenal function and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of fresh trifolium pratense flowers on a sunny day at their peak blooming stage.
Dry the harvested flowers at 50 degrees celsius for 2 hours to remove excess moisture content.
Steep 10 grams of dried trifolium pratense flowers in 100 milliliters of coconut oil at 50 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Strain the oil mixture through a cheesecloth and discard the solids then add 10 grams of beeswax.
Heat the mixture at 60 degrees celsius for 15 minutes to create a smooth and even textured cream.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal oat creams contain anti-inflammatory compounds such as saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that help reduce inflammation in the skin, which can be exacerbated by adrenal fatigue, leading to chronic pain and discomfort.

Soothing and calming effects: The moisturizing and soothing properties of herbal oats can help calm irritated skin, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, which are all essential for managing adrenal fatigue symptoms such as anxiety, insomnia, and mood swings.

Antioxidant properties: Herbal oat creams contain antioxidants that neutralize free radicals in the body, which can contribute to oxidative stress, a common issue in adrenal fatigue. By reducing oxidative stress, herbal oats can help promote overall skin health and reduce symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Avena sativa, also known as oats, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because it contains a unique combination of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins that work synergistically to calm the nervous system and reduce cortisol levels. By soothing the adrenal glands, Avena sativa creams promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support the body's natural ability to recover from fatigue. This natural approach helps to restore balance to the body's hormonal and energy production systems, allowing for a more sustainable and enduring energy level.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: These compounds help alleviate adrenal fatigue by reducing inflammation and promoting the production of cortisol, a hormone produced by the adrenal glands that plays a crucial role in stress response.

Phenylethylamine (PEA): PEA has been found to increase the production of neurotransmitters like dopamine, serotonin, and norepinephrine, which help regulate stress response and can aid in the management of adrenal fatigue.

Gamma-Aminobutyric Acid (GABA): GABA is an inhibitory neurotransmitter that helps regulate the body's response to stress. By promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety, GABA can help alleviate the symptoms associated with adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Seeds: High in adaptogenic compounds like avenacosides, which help support adrenal function and reduce stress.
Roots: Rich in starch and inulin, which can help nourish and calm the adrenal glands.
Leaves: Contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help alleviate anxiety and promote relaxation associated with adrenal fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of avena sativa roots and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Infuse the roots in 100 ml of carrier oil like jojoba oil at 60-70 degrees celsius for 2-3 hours.
Strain the infused oil using cheesecloth or a coffee filter and discard the solids immediately.
Blend the infused oil with 20 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of emulsifying wax in a double boiler.
Whip the blended mixture with a hand mixer or blender until it reaches a smooth and creamy texture.

remedy_properties: Digestive Soothing: Peppermint's anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties can calm digestive issues, reducing stress on the adrenals and promoting overall well-being. This relief from digestive discomfort can help alleviate some of the symptoms of adrenal fatigue.

Stress Reduction: The menthol in peppermint has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce feelings of anxiety and tension, allowing the adrenal glands to recover and recharge. This reduced stress response can help alleviate some of the symptoms of adrenal fatigue.

Antioxidant Properties: Peppermint's antioxidant properties can help protect the adrenals from oxidative damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy adrenal function and reducing inflammation. This protection can help support adrenal recovery and reduce the risk of chronic adrenal fatigue.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Mentha x piperita, also known as peppermint, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its ability to reduce cortisol levels and improve digestion. The menthol in peppermint oil relaxes the body and mind, reducing stress and anxiety that can exacerbate adrenal fatigue. Additionally, peppermint's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm the adrenal glands, allowing them to function more efficiently. This natural remedy promotes relaxation and rejuvenation, supporting the body's natural ability to recover from adrenal fatigue.
remedy_constituents: Menthol: Menthol, a terpene, helps with adrenal fatigue by promoting relaxation and reducing stress due to its calming effects on the nervous system.

Rosmarinic acid: Rosmarinic acid, a phenolic compound, aids in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue, by scavenging free radicals and modulating the body's antioxidant response.

Limonene: Limonene, a terpene, helps alleviate adrenal fatigue by supporting the body's natural detoxification processes, enhancing the elimination of toxins, and promoting a sense of balance and well-being.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in menthol and menthone, which help to reduce inflammation and improve circulation.
Stems: Contain a high amount of menthol, which has a cooling effect and can help to reduce stress and anxiety.
Flowers: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties that can help to protect the adrenal glands from oxidative stress.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of fresh mentha x piperita leaves in the early morning when the plant is at its highest oil content.
Dry the harvested leaves in a single layer at 30-40 degrees celsius for 2-3 hours to reduce moisture content.
Infuse 20 grams of dried leaves in 100 milliliters of a carrier oil such as sweet almond oil for 4-6 hours.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth into a clean glass container to remove the solids.
Whip 50 grams of shea butter with 20 milliliters of the infused oil until it reaches a smooth and creamy consistency.

remedy_properties: Sedative and calming effects: Valerian's sedative properties can help to calm the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety associated with adrenal fatigue, allowing for better relaxation and sleep.

Adrenal support: Valerian has been shown to have a positive effect on the adrenal glands, helping to reduce cortisol levels and promote the production of cortisol-reducing hormones, which can alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.

Stress reduction and adaptogenic properties: Valerian's adaptogenic properties allow it to help the body adapt to stress, reducing the negative effects of chronic stress on the adrenal glands and promoting a sense of balance and well-being.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valeriana officinalis, also known as valerian, creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its adaptogenic properties and ability to promote relaxation and reduce stress. The herb contains valerenic acid, which has a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to calm the mind and body. Adrenal fatigue is often characterized by increased stress and anxiety, making valerian creams an effective treatment option. By reducing cortisol levels and promoting relaxation, valerian creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue and promote overall well-being.
remedy_constituents: Isovaleric acid: It helps with adrenal fatigue by promoting relaxation and reducing stress by acting as a GABA receptor agonist, thereby calming the nervous system.

Valerenic acid: It aids in reducing cortisol levels and promoting sleep by inhibiting the enzyme GABA transaminase, leading to increased GABA levels in the brain and helping alleviate adrenal fatigue symptoms.
Valeranone: It contributes to the reduction of stress and anxiety by acting as a GABA receptor agonist, thereby promoting relaxation and reducing the production of stress hormones like cortisol.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian root is often used to make creams for adrenal fatigue due to its calming and adaptogenic properties.
Flowers: Valerian flowers are used to make creams for adrenal fatigue due to their ability to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
Seeds: Valerian seeds are used to make creams for adrenal fatigue due to their high content of valerenic acid, which has a sedative and anti-anxiety effect.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of valeriana officinalis roots in the early morning when the plant is at its highest potency level.
Dry the harvested roots in a warm place with good airflow for 7 to 10 days.
Grind 50 grams of dried valeriana officinalis roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar.
Combine the ground root powder with 200 grams of coconut oil and 10 grams of beeswax in a double boiler.
Stir the mixture continuously for 10 minutes and then let it cool before transferring it to an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender creams helps with adrenal fatigue because they promote relaxation and reduce stress levels, which is crucial for individuals suffering from adrenal fatigue. The calming properties of lavender help to calm the nervous system, allowing the body to shift out of "fight or flight" mode and into a state of rest and repair. Additionally, lavender's adaptogenic properties help to support the body's natural response to stress, promoting balance and resilience in the face of chronic stressors.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic and Sedative Effects: Lavender's calming effects can help reduce anxiety and stress, which is often a precursor to adrenal fatigue, allowing the body to better manage its energy production and cortisol regulation.

Anti-Inflammatory and Antioxidant Properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties may help reduce inflammation in the body, which is a common issue associated with adrenal fatigue, and protect against oxidative stress that can exacerbate fatigue and other symptoms.

Adaptogenic and Balancing Effects: Lavender's adaptogenic properties can help regulate and balance the body's response to stress, promoting healthy cortisol levels and supporting the body's natural ability to cope with adversity, which is essential for managing adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the English lavender plant are often used in herbal remedies because they contain a high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help to soothe and calm the body.
Buds: Lavender buds are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can help to reduce stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality.
remedy_recipe: Infuse dried lavandula angustifolia flowers in carrier oil for 4 weeks under sunlight.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth and discard solids after 24 hours.
Mix the strained oil with beeswax and coconut oil in a 30:40:30 ratio by weight.
Heat the mixture to 160°f for 10 minutes while stirring occasionally until beeswax melts fully.
Pour the melted mixture into sterilized jars and label with date and ingredients after cooling down slowly at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile creams helps with adrenal fatigue because it calms the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety that can exacerbate adrenal fatigue symptoms. The anti-inflammatory properties of chamomile also help to soothe and relax the adrenals, allowing them to function more efficiently. Additionally, chamomile's calming effects on the body promote deeper sleep and improved sleep quality, which is often disrupted in individuals with adrenal fatigue. By promoting relaxation and reducing inflammation, chamomile creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue and promote overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Chamomile's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress, inflammation, and tissue damage caused by chronic stress, which contributes to adrenal fatigue.

Calming and Sedative Effects: Chamomile's calming properties can help regulate the body's response to stress, promoting relaxation, reducing anxiety and restlessness, and improving sleep quality – all of which are essential for adrenal recovery.

Anxiolytic and Anti-Anxiety Properties: Chamomile's anxiolytic compounds help alleviate anxiety symptoms by modulating GABA receptors, reducing cortisol levels, and promoting a sense of calmness and relaxation, which is crucial for managing adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots are commonly used in medicinal creams to soothe and calm the skin.
Flowers: The apigenin content in chamomile flowers helps to reduce anxiety and stress, making them an effective addition to creams for adrenal fatigue relief.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried matricaria chamomilla flowers weighing approximately two ounces.
Combine the dried flowers with one cup of sweet almond oil in a double boiler setup.
Heat the mixture for three hours or until the mixture reaches a temperature of 160°f.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container.
Allow the infused oil to cool and thicken at room temperature for several hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop creams helps with adrenal fatigue because they provide a natural and effective way to support the body's endocrine system. The maypop plant, also known as Passiflora incarnata, has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and reduce stress, which are both major contributors to adrenal fatigue. By using herbal maypop creams, individuals can help regulate their cortisol levels, improve sleep quality, and increase energy levels, ultimately leading to a reduction in symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic compounds: Maypop cream contains anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids, which help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress associated with adrenal fatigue.

Adaptogenic saponins: The saponins present in maypop cream are known for their adaptogenic properties, allowing the body to adapt to stressors and promoting resilience, which can help mitigate the effects of adrenal fatigue.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Maypop cream's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, common underlying factors that contribute to adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Maypop plant are rich in saponins, which help to calm and soothe the nervous system, making them effective for alleviating symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Buds: Maypop buds contain flavonoids and terpenes that have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to reduce stress and anxiety associated with adrenal fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh passionflower flowers at dawn, carefully selecting only organic blooms with no signs of pests or diseases.
Dry the harvested flowers in a warm air-circulating oven set to 150°f for two hours, ensuring complete desiccation of delicate petals.
Grind dried passionflower flowers into a fine powder using an electric spice grinder, targeting a yield of one tablespoon per teaspoon of powder.
Melt one ounce of coconut oil and combine with the ground passionflower powder, blending for 30 seconds to create a uniform mixture.
Pour the coconut oil-herbal mixture into sterilized glass jars, sealing tightly and storing in the refrigerator at 50°f for a minimum of two weeks before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Skullcap creams helps with adrenal fatigue because they contain the herb Scutellaria lateriflora, which has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and reduce stress. Adrenal fatigue is often characterized by chronic stress, anxiety, and fatigue, making skullcap a natural fit for soothing the body's response to stress. The cream can help regulate cortisol levels, promote relaxation, and reduce inflammation in the adrenal glands, allowing them to function more efficiently. By calming the nervous system and reducing stress, skullcap creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue and promote overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Skullcap helps the body adapt to stress by regulating cortisol levels, reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, which is particularly important for individuals suffering from adrenal fatigue who often experience chronic stress.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Skullcap's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue, and also alleviate symptoms such as joint pain, muscle tension, and headaches associated with it.

Anxiolytic and Sedative Properties: Skullcap's anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) and sedative effects can help calm the nervous system, promoting a sense of relaxation and reducing stress, which is essential for individuals with adrenal fatigue who often experience anxiety, insomnia, and mood changes.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the skullcap plant are used in medicinal creams to help alleviate stress and anxiety symptoms associated with adrenal fatigue, promoting relaxation and calmness.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes (underground stems) of skullcap contain compounds that have been shown to reduce cortisol levels and promote a sense of balance and well-being, making them ideal for use in creams to support adrenal function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality scutellaria lateriflora flowers and leaves for drying.
Dry the herbal material in a warm place or using a food dehydrator.
Mix dried herbs with a base cream and carrier oils.
Infuse the herbal mixture for 2 hours under low heat.
Strain and package the final cream preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its adaptogenic properties, which help to regulate the body's response to stress. The herb contains rosmarinic acid, a compound that has been shown to reduce cortisol levels and promote relaxation, both of which are essential for managing adrenal fatigue. Additionally, lemon balm's calming effects can help to soothe anxiety and insomnia, common symptoms associated with adrenal fatigue. By promoting a sense of calm and reducing stress, lemon balm creams can help to alleviate the physical and emotional symptoms of adrenal fatigue, leading to improved overall health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) properties: Lemon balm cream's anxiolytic properties help to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety symptoms associated with adrenal fatigue, promoting relaxation and reducing stress.

Adaptogenic properties: Lemon balm cream's adaptogenic properties help to balance the body's response to stress, allowing it to "adapt" to changing conditions and reduce the negative impact of chronic stress on the adrenal glands.

Vaso-relaxant properties: Lemon balm cream's vaso-relaxant properties help to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation in the body, which can help to alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, muscle pain, and joint pain associated with adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used to make calming and soothing creams, helping to reduce anxiety and stress associated with adrenal fatigue.
Leaves: The leaves provide a gentle and anti-inflammatory property, which can help to ease skin irritations and discomfort often experienced during adrenal fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves in the morning after dew has dried for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested leaves using a food dehydrator at 55°c for 6 hours or air-drying for 7-10 days.
Combine 20% melissa officinalis dried leaf with 80% jojoba oil and store the mixture in an airtight container for 4 weeks to allow infusion.
Filter the infused mixture through a coffee filter or cheesecloth into a clean glass bowl, discarding solids after 10 minutes of pressing.
Transfer the filtered liquid to sterilized glass jars, filling them to the top and sealing immediately for shelf-stable storage at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger creams helps with adrenal fatigue because they contain a potent blend of herbs that work synergistically to soothe and regulate the adrenals. The ginger, in particular, has natural anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce stress and anxiety, while other herbs like ashwagandha and ginseng enhance the body's resilience to stress. By calming the nervous system and promoting relaxation, these herbal creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, brain fog, and mood swings, allowing the adrenals to function more efficiently and promoting overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the body, which is a common contributor to adrenal fatigue.

Adaptogenic: Herbal ginger creams often contain adaptogenic herbs like ashwagandha or rhodiola, which help the body adapt to stress by regulating cortisol levels and improving energy metabolism, alleviating symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Vasodilatory: Ginger's vasodilating properties can help improve blood flow and oxygenation to the adrenals, reducing fatigue, brain fog, and other symptoms associated with adrenal exhaustion.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Barks: Containing a higher concentration of phenolic compounds, such as cinnamic acid, which have antioxidant and adaptogenic effects to support adrenal function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of fresh ginger rhizome and wash it thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the ginger in a food dehydrator at 40°c for 8 hours or air dry for 24 hours.
Grind the dried ginger into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 10 grams of powdered ginger with 20 milliliters of coconut oil and 5 millilitres of beeswax in a heat-resistant container.
Heat the mixture at low temperature for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a smooth, creamy consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compound curcumin in turmeric has been shown to reduce cortisol levels, alleviate stress, and promote relaxation. When applied topically as a cream, it can also help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing symptoms of adrenal fatigue such as dryness and itchiness. Additionally, turmeric's adaptogenic properties help to support the body's natural response to stress, promoting balance and vitality. This natural remedy can be especially beneficial for individuals experiencing chronic stress and fatigue.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's curcuminoids, such as curcumin and demethoxycurcumin, have potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation in the body caused by adrenal fatigue, leading to improved energy levels.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in turmeric creams can neutralize free radicals and oxidative stress that contribute to adrenal fatigue, promoting overall well-being and reducing the risk of chronic diseases.

Adaptogenic properties: Turmeric contains adaptogenic compounds like curcumin that help regulate the body's response to stress, allowing it to adapt to changing circumstances and potentially alleviating symptoms of adrenal fatigue such as burnout and exhaustion.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Turmeric rhyzomes contain a high concentration of curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
Roots: Turmeric roots are rich in antioxidants and have been traditionally used to support adrenal function and reduce stress.
remedy_recipe: Measure 250g of raw shea butter and 50g of beeswax into a double boiler.
Melt the ingredients in the double boiler for 10-15 minutes until smooth and combined.
Add 20g of turmeric powder derived from curcuma longa rhizomes and stir well.
Continue heating the mixture for an additional 5 minutes to infuse the curcuminoids into the cream.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool and thicken at room temperature for 30-45 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary creams helps with adrenal fatigue because of its ability to promote blood circulation, improve cognitive function, and reduce stress levels. The antioxidants present in rosemary help to combat oxidative stress, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue. Additionally, rosemary's anti-inflammatory properties may help to alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, brain fog, and mood disturbances associated with adrenal exhaustion. By applying a rosemary cream topically, individuals can potentially experience an increase in energy levels and a reduction in overall fatigue.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Rosemary's antioxidants help combat oxidative stress caused by chronic inflammation, which can exacerbate adrenal fatigue symptoms like fatigue and brain fog.

Stress-reducing compounds: Rosemary contains compounds like camphor, borneol, and bornyl acetate that have been shown to reduce stress and anxiety levels by promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol production.

Circulatory and vasodilatory properties: Rosemary's ability to dilate blood vessels and improve circulation can help increase oxygenation and nutrient delivery to the adrenal glands, supporting their function and reducing fatigue symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rosemary roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their adaptogenic properties, making them effective for alleviating stress and promoting relaxation.
Seeds: Rosemary seeds contain a high concentration of antioxidants and essential fatty acids, which help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and improving overall skin health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of fresh rosmarinus officinalis leaves and dry them in the shade for 7-10 days.
Combine 50 grams of dried rosmarinus officinalis leaves with 250 milliliters of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Store the mixture in a cool dark place for 14 days to allow for infusion and then strain the liquid using cheesecloth or a coffee filter.
Mix 100 grams of beeswax with 50 milliliters of infused rosmarinus officinalis oil and 20 milliliters of vitamin e oil in a double boiler until smooth and creamy.
Pour the mixture into clean glass jars and let it cool and solidify at room temperature for at least 30 minutes before use or storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage creams helps with adrenal fatigue because they contain compounds that can help regulate cortisol levels in the body. Adrenal fatigue occurs when the adrenals glands are exhausted from prolonged stress, leading to hormonal imbalances and a range of symptoms including fatigue, brain fog, and weight gain. Sage contains rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to inhibit the production of cortisol, helping to restore balance to the adrenal glands. By reducing cortisol levels, sage creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue and promote a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sage cream's antioxidant properties can help reduce oxidative stress, which is a common contributor to adrenal fatigue, by neutralizing free radicals and protecting cells from damage.

Adrenal Support Compounds: Sage contains compounds like camphor and thujone that have been shown to support the adrenals, helping to regulate cortisol production and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue such as fatigue, insomnia, and anxiety.

Inflammation Reduction: Sage cream's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce chronic inflammation, which is often a underlying factor in adrenal fatigue, by inhibiting pro-inflammatory enzymes and reducing inflammation in the body.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots are valued for their adaptogenic properties, which help to regulate hormonal imbalances and reduce stress-related symptoms associated with adrenal fatigue.

Rhyzomes: The rhizomes of the sage plant contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making them useful in reducing inflammation and promoting overall health in individuals with adrenal fatigue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 cups of fresh or dried salvia officinalis leaves and stems for infusion.
Combine the herb with 4 cups of boiling water and let it steep for 20 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a bowl, discarding the solids after 15 minutes.
Mix the infused liquid with 1 cup of coconut oil and 1/2 cup of beeswax in a double boiler.
Stir the mixture until melted and smooth, then pour it into containers for immediate use.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for adrenal fatigue are topical preparations that combine herbs with moisturizing properties to help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue. These creams work by reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and nourishing the skin. Effective herbal creams for adrenal fatigue include Rhodiola rosea, Schisandra chinensis, Withania somnifera, Panax ginseng, Eleutherococcus senticosus, Bacopa monnieri, Valeriana officinalis, Astragalus membranaceus, Ocimum sanctum, and Glycyrrhiza glabra. If left untreated, adrenal fatigue can disrupt sleep, impair cognitive function, and lead to weight gain, mood swings, and fatigue, severely impacting one's daily life and overall well-being.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to adrenal fatigue that are treated with herbal creams are stress-related conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. Herbal creams containing adaptogenic herbs like ashwagandha, rhodiola, and ginseng can help alleviate symptoms of these conditions by promoting relaxation, reducing cortisol levels, and improving sleep quality. Additionally, herbal creams may also be used to treat chronic pain, inflammation, and skin issues such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with adrenal fatigue is a blend of Ashwagandha, Licorice Root, and Rhodiola Rosea. Ashwagandha promotes stress resilience and adaptogenic properties, while Licorice Root soothes adrenal stress and supports cortisol balance. Rhodiola Rosea enhances mood, energy, and mental clarity, helping to alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue. When applied topically in a cream form, these herbs can work synergistically to nourish and support the adrenal glands, promoting overall well-being and energy. Regular use can lead to improved resilience and vitality.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Frontiers in pharmacology, herbal creams may be beneficial for adrenal fatigue due to the potential anti-fatigue effects of multi-component extracts of medicinal plants. The study reviewed various traditional Japanese herbal preparations, such as Hochuekkito, Juzentaihoto, and Rikkunshito, which have shown efficacy in improving fatigue and involuntary weight loss in patients with genitourinary cancer and chronic fatigue syndrome. Specifically, a 1985 study by Kuroda et al. found that Hochuekkito showed efficacy in involuntary weight loss and fatigue in 63% of 162 patients with genitourinary cancer, while a 2010 study by Jeong et al. reported a significant improvement in cancer-related fatigue within 2 weeks.
